description: The 'Ndrina Latella is a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, controlling the neighborhoods of Ravagnese, Croce Valanidi, and Pellaro. It operates in collaboration with the De Stefano and Pelle clans. The clan has been involved in extortion, money laundering, and drug trafficking, with several members arrested in major operations such as Reale, Reggio Sud, and Araba Fenice.
